title: Fetch, Streams, AbortSignal, Conditional Requests, and Publisher Budgets
description: The service calls response.text on unbounded bodies, uses one timeout signal, overwrites validators on parse failure, follows automatic redirects without policy, and retries every origin together. Learners cumulatively produce bounded publisher-friendly Fetch adapter through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Compose caller, deadline, shutdown, and attempt signals, preserve abort reasons, and remove listeners through settled ownership.
Read response streams incrementally with wire, decoded, compression, character, time, and cancellation limits and release or cancel the body.
Send ETag and Last-Modified validators correctly, give If-None-Match precedence, handle 304 without a body, and commit validators only with admitted state.
